response.original_title: The 2012 Sandy Hook Massacre & What Led Up To It [Adam Lanza]
response.overview: An in-depth look into the life of Adam Lanza, the perpetrator of the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting on December 14, 2012, and the events leading up to the tragedy. It also details the attack itself, its immediate aftermath, and the long-term impact, including the rise of conspiracy theories and the efforts of victims' families to promote gun violence prevention and mental health support.
response.title: The 2012 Sandy Hook Massacre & What Led Up To It [Adam Lanza]
